arts.ttl: Rashford WAR, Salah REPLACEMENT, Van Dijk contract BOMB, Man City PLAN
arts.sum: Rashford WAR, Salah REPLACEMENT, Van Dijk contract BOMB, Man City PLAN – FootballTransfers recap As the January transfer window heats up, there has been big news regarding Marcus Rashford, Mo Salah, Virgil van Dijk, Jamie Gittens and a whole lot more…

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola accepts Erling Haaland deal may damage prospects of other players
arts.sum: New recruits may have to accept a back-up role or offer something different to get into Manchester City’s team.

arts.ttl: Man City's £1billion splurge signals end of historic Premier League charges case
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to complete a number of major signings in the January transfer window, including Lens centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov and Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmousch

arts.ttl: Man City scrap transfer plan as they advance on £250m move NOW for Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City's answer to their relative struggles is to splash the cash in the January transfer window, with £250million committed to re-energising Pep Guardiola's squad, and scrapping plans to wait for the club's new director of football

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains Man City's ten year plan for Erling Haaland - Omar Marmoush will take note
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has given his immediate reaction to the news that Erling Haaland will remain at Manchester City until 2034 having signed a huge new contract.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola hopeful that Erling Haaland's new mega-contract can persuade Kevin De Bruyne to stay at Man City past the end of the season
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: De Bruyne, out of contract this summer, is returning to his best after an injury-hit campaign and provided a world-class assist for Phil Foden at Brentford in midweek.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola urges Haaland to deliver after signing Manchester City deal
arts.sum: Norwegian striker has agreed record new contract ‘He has to perform well with the team and push’ Pep Guardiola has called on Erling Haaland “to deliver” and inspire another decade of success after signing an historic nine-and-a-half-year contract at Manchester City. City travel to Ipswich on Sunday looking for a third win in four matches to reignite their Premier League season after a disappointing spell that saw them lose six in eight matches. “I’ve been really pleased – but now we have to deliver,” Guardiola said after he was stunned on learning the duration of striker’s deal. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liam Delap stands alone as the classic English No 9 of the future
arts.sum: Improbable hype around the Ipswich forward is growing as he faces the club that reared and discarded him This season: one of the best strikers in the Premier League. Last season: not in the Premier League, and if we’re being honest not even really a striker. Kieran McKenna remembers Liam Delap coming to Portman Road with Hull late 2023 and starting on the right wing: trying to use his pace to beat the offside trap, trying to get in behind and fashion chances for Aaron Connolly, and mostly failing to do either. Hull lost 3-0. The blooming of Delap for Ipswich under McKenna has been one of the unlikelier underdog yarns of recent months. Until recently, this was another young, gifted age-group forward whose career appeared to be meandering towards frustration, another item of floating big-club debris trying to pick up whatever scraps were left on the table. We’ve seen this film before. It ends with a series of unsatisfying Championship loans, three moderately successful seasons in League One and then a long extended dotage recording podcasts. Continue reading...

arts.sum: Juventus defender and Manchester City target Andrea Cambiaso waved at the home fans and gifted...

arts.ttl: Zlatan Ibrahimovic confirms AC Milan interest in Kyle Walker as legendary former striker gives his honest thoughts on a deal for 34-year-old star
arts.sum: After a string of disappointing performances during his side's slump in the middle of the campaign, Walker then announced publicly that he wanted a move away from the Etihad.
